label: Stat part (mood)
description: Scales the stat by a curve evaluated against the pawn's current mood level.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

factorFromMoodCurve.label: Factor from mood curve
factorFromMoodCurve.description: Piecewise linear curve mapping mood level to the stat factor.
